history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! Welcome to McDonald's. What type of food would you like today?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hello! I'm quite hungry today and looking for a hearty meal. I avoid sugar, so could you recommend something for me?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For a hearty meal, I'd suggest the Chicken Maharaja Mac. Would you like to add any drinks or fries?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for the suggestion. Since I avoid sugar, could I get the Chicken Maharaja Mac with medium fries? That sounds hearty for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll prepare your Chicken Maharaja Mac. We don't have fries in this menu right now—would you like a drink or dessert instead?
